alert.summary: orders-db connection pool exhausted (100/100 in use) and CPU at 96% for 9m

metrics.name: db_connections_in_use
metrics.description: Active connections vs max pool size 100

logs.message: long-running transaction holding lock on orders for 45s (pid 3120)
could not get db connection from pool within 2000ms (pool exhausted)
lock wait timeout exceeded; transactions queuing on orders table

expected_root_cause.summary: A long-running transaction holds a lock on the orders table, causing lock contention; queries pile up, the connection pool exhausts (100/100) and CPU saturates. Killing/committing the blocking transaction and adding statement timeouts relieves saturation.
key_signals: connections climb to the pool max (100) as lock waits spike
log: long-running transaction holding lock on orders
